name: Formpipe Software AB (publ)
summary: Formpipe Software AB (publ), a software company, develops and provides enterprise content management (ECM) software and solutions in Nordic region, the United Kingdom, rest of Europe, North America, and internationally. Its software enables organizations to capture, process, store, archive, and deliver information. The company offers Acadre, an ECM system for municipal market; Lasernet for input/output management; Long-Term Archive, an archiving solution for operations seeking security, traceability, and flexibility; ATOM, a technical solution for municipalities; Contentworker Online, a solution for achieving a cloud journey; FAS, a platform for digitizing of fund work; Meetings Plus for digital meeting management; and Portal Bas, a platform for e-services and a publishing solution. It also provides Platina, a product and platform for document and case management; Platina LS, an electronic quality management system, which manages documents and processes for regulatory quality management; and Quality Control, a product to manage and monitor data quality from operating systems and network disks. In addition, the company offers TAP, a business process management platform that streamlines and automates business processes; TAS, a platform for application and grant management; X-docs that provides a platform for managing quality documentation; and W3D3, a cloud service for document and case management. The company is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
